user.title: Ctrlable Mirror
user.description: This adds the Mirror controller. Open the Mirror panel in the sidebar to paste your license key and link your fixtures.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Ctrlable Mirror is already set up.

init.title: Ctrlable Mirror license
init.description: Paste the license key issued for this installation. You can also manage links and the license from the Mirror panel: {panel}
